caption: Just finished these macrame wall hangers for the shop! Perfect for fall home decor. #HandmadeinRichmond #MacrameDecor #RVAMakes
Fall walk at Maymont with the family today. Gorgeous October afternoon in Richmond. #Richmond #Maymont #FamilyTime
Student appreciation notes arrived today. These little reminders keep me going. #SchoolCounselor #HenricoSchools
Weekend craft market haul from the RVA makers market. So much local talent in this city. #RVA #HandmadeWithLove #RichmondVA
College and career readiness for the 8th graders; planning the fall night.
1:1 with Dr. Fredericks Tuesday, counseling team Wednesday morning.
Two crisis referrals this week, kept confidential, checking in gently.
Saturday walk with Renee at Byrd Park — the most consistent hour of my week.
Crock-pot dinner tonight; one new recipe this month, about half survive.
Weeknight walk with Greg, the space the marriage uses for the serious talk.
Sunday lunch at Donna's, the closest thing I have to church now.
Nora's pushing small boundaries — give rope slowly, retract if needed.
Owen transitions to middle school next year; quietly strategizing.
Mental Health Awareness Week planning on the counseling side.
Thursday phone call with Sharon in Virginia Beach.
Firepit Friday in the backyard; the movie screen pulls the teenagers in.
Indie folk on the commute, local NPR when the mood's quiet.
ENT flare with Dr. Nolan — spring sinuses and allergies overlapping.
Personal day taken without guilt; a counselor knows burnout.
River City Diner chicken pot pie after a long week.
Library holds came in — a memoir Renee pushed on me.
Deck needs re-staining this summer, on Greg's list.
Hazelnut drip at 6 AM, the day starts quiet.
Parent conference with the bilingual aide — basic Spanish and patience.
Kids' activities shuffle; Owen's rec basketball, Greg coaches.
Quiet-room decompress after school in the guest room.
Costco and Target on a rhythm; thrift for the kids' clothes.
Cooking competition show with the kids tonight.
